headline: Will Analyst Upgrades on Loan Growth and Margins Change Citizens Financial Group’s (CFG) Narrative?
summary: Earlier in March 2026, Citizens Financial Group was upgraded by Baird and received reaffirmed positive views from Morgan Stanley, with both firms citing the bank’s improved loan growth, stronger net interest margin, healthier fee income, and continued focus on returning capital to shareholders. While analysts highlighted these operational gains and capital strength, they also contrasted them against Citizens’ recent history of flat sales and earnings, underscoring a tension between improving...

headline: Citizens Deepens San Francisco Commitment through Community and Economic Investments
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 17, 2026--Citizens today announced a series of coordinated community and economic investments that underscore its long-term commitment to San Francisco as a place to do business, build community and drive inclusive growth. Together, these commitments reflect Citizens’ belief that sustained progress comes from working alongside local leaders, nonprofits and entrepreneurs to strengthen the city’s economic foundation.

content.title: Citizens Deepens San Francisco Commitment through Community and Economic Investments
